nasb.text: Yet when they had devoured them, it could not be detected that they had devoured them, for they were just as ugly as before. Then I awoke.

esv.text: but when they had eaten them no one would have known that they had eaten them, for they were still as ugly as at the beginning. Then I awoke.

cnv.text: 牠們吃了以後，卻看不出牠們是吃掉了肥牛，因為牠們醜陋的樣子仍是與先前一樣。我就醒了。

ccb.text: 可是，它们吃了以后却仍然像以前那么丑陋。这时，我就醒了。

csbs.text: 虽然吃进了肚子，却看不出已经吃进去了，因为它们丑陋的样子仍与先前一样。我就醒了。
